prompt: Write a 500-word pre-launch investor email from the founder of openpatent.ai to a Tier-1 lead investor. Must (a) open with the AI-idea-theft market signal in one concrete sentence, (b) name the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit) as the technical moat, (c) cite the 5-tier ladder ($29/$149/$999/$2499/$4999) and the unit economics (gross margin >92% on the $149 tier, >97% on the $2499 premium, $0 COGS on the Bitcoin OTS confirmation), (d) name the 22/33 BFT sovereign-temple v3.0 with 6 care dimensions, 11 domains, 55 bridge pairs, (e) name the 10+ jurisdictional coverage (US 35 USC 102, EU eIDAS, UK Patents Act, China Hangzhou 2018, France Marseille 2025, WIPO 2022), (f) cite the .ai portfolio (openpatent.ai, ipcastle.ai, legalof.ai, harvi.ai, sovereign.openpatent.ai, gaming.openpatent.ai), (g) cite the MCP 33-tool surface, (h) state the ask (Series A: $8M @ $40M post, 18-month runway, 4 hires: 2 sovereign-temple engineers + 1 jurisdictional counsel + 1 growth), (i) close with the canonical signature line. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {subject:string, body:string, ask:string, signature:string}.
